mapper.select: SELECT sb.name AS subjectName, lt.start_time AS startTime, lt.end_time AS endTime, lt.day_of_week AS dayOfWeek, lt.start_date AS startDate, lt.end_date AS endDate, cr.name AS classroomName, cr.location AS classroomLocation, t.name AS teacherName FROM (SELECT * FROM user WHERE user_id = #{id}) u INNER JOIN student_enrollment se ON se.student_id = u.user_id INNER JOIN lecture lt ON se.lecture_id = lt.lecture_id INNER JOIN subject sb ON lt.subject_id = sb.subject_id INNER JOIN classroom cr ON lt.classroom_id = cr.classroom_id INNER JOIN teacher_assignment ta ON lt.lecture_id = ta.lecture_id INNER JOIN user t ON ta.teacher_id = t.user_id WHERE CURDATE() BETWEEN lt.start_date AND lt.end_date

SELECT concat(va.vehicle_id,'호차') AS vehicleId, d.name AS driverName, d.phone AS driverPhone, va.driver_id AS driverId, v.vehicle_no AS vehicleNo, va.location FROM (SELECT * FROM user WHERE user_id = 'stu002') u INNER JOIN student_enrollment se ON u.user_id = se.student_id INNER JOIN lecture lt ON se.lecture_id = lt.lecture_id INNER JOIN payment p ON se.enrollment_id = p.enrollment_id INNER JOIN vehicle_assignment va ON se.lecture_id = va.lecture_id INNER JOIN vehicle v ON v.vehicle_id = va.vehicle_id INNER JOIN user d ON d.user_id = va.driver_id WHERE CURDATE() BETWEEN lt.start_date AND lt.end_date
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM notice WHERE target_role_id=2
SELECT notice_id AS noticeId, title, content, created_at AS createdAt FROM notice WHERE target_role_id = 2 ORDER BY notice_id desc LIMIT #{beginRow}, #{size}
SELECT notice_id AS noticeId, title, content, created_at AS createdAt FROM notice WHERE notice_id = #{noticeId}
SELECT subject_id AS subjectId, NAME AS subjectName FROM subject
SELECT name AS subjectName, description FROM subject WHERE name = #{subjectName}

SELECT ROUND(AVG(sf.rating_lecture), 1) AS avgRating FROM satisfaction sf INNER JOIN payment p ON sf.payment_id = p.payment_id INNER JOIN student_enrollment se ON p.enrollment_id = se.enrollment_id INNER JOIN lecture lt ON se.lecture_id = lt.lecture_id INNER JOIN subject sb ON lt.subject_id = sb.subject_id WHERE sb.name = #{subjectName}

SELECT sf.rating_lecture AS ratingLecture, r.content AS content FROM satisfaction sf INNER JOIN payment p ON sf.payment_id = p.payment_id INNER JOIN student_enrollment se ON p.enrollment_id = se.enrollment_id INNER JOIN lecture lt ON se.lecture_id = lt.lecture_id INNER JOIN subject sb ON lt.subject_id = sb.subject_id INNER JOIN user u ON se.student_id = u.user_id INNER JOIN review r ON sf.satisfaction_id = r.satisfaction_id WHERE sb.name = #{subjectName} ORDER BY r.review_id DESC LIMIT 0, 3

SELECT p.payment_id AS paymentId, sb.name AS subjectName, lt.start_time AS startTime, lt.end_time AS endTime, lt.day_of_week AS dayOfWeek, lt.start_date AS startDate, lt.end_date AS endDate, cr.name AS classroomName, cr.location AS classroomLocation, t.name AS teacherName, CASE WHEN s.satisfaction_id IS NOT NULL THEN TRUE ELSE FALSE END AS isEvaluated FROM (SELECT * FROM user WHERE user_id = 'stu002') u INNER JOIN student_enrollment se ON se.student_id = u.user_id INNER JOIN lecture lt ON se.lecture_id = lt.lecture_id INNER JOIN subject sb ON lt.subject_id = sb.subject_id INNER JOIN classroom cr ON lt.classroom_id = cr.classroom_id INNER JOIN teacher_assignment ta ON lt.lecture_id = ta.lecture_id INNER JOIN user t ON ta.teacher_id = t.user_id LEFT JOIN payment p ON p.enrollment_id = se.enrollment_id LEFT JOIN satisfaction s ON s.payment_id = p.payment_id WHERE CURDATE() >= lt.end_date
